videos.headline: Michigan State scores three TDs in the fourth to blow out Miami
videos.description: Kenneth Walker III runs for 172 yards and Payton Thorne tosses four scores as Michigan State hands Miami a 38-17 defeat.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Michigan State scores three TDs in the fourth to blow out Miami) 2021/09/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: D'Eriq King stripped by Michigan State for the fumble
videos.description: Michigan State's Jeff Pietrowski strips D'Eriq King from behind as Miami turn it over on its very first drive.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (D’Eriq King stripped by Michigan State for the fumble) 2021/9/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: King finds Rambo in the back of the end zone on fourth down
videos.description: Charleston Rambo hauls in a pass from D'Eriq King on fourth down to put Miami ahead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (King finds Rambo in the back of the end zone on fourth down) 2021/9/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Michigan State picks off King to force second turnover of the day
videos.description: Michigan State's Angelo Grose picks off Miami QB D'Eriq King late in the second half.
